validations.summary: /// Validates the specified codeset, including the coding role. ///
/// The fully fleshed validation with role applied. ///
validations.conditions: codes.Count( | codes.FirstOrDefault( | query.Count( | ageInMonthsAtAdmission.HasValue && genderTypeCode.HasValue | dtoList.Count > 0 | (int | (int | ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value < cpt.MinAgeInMonths || ageInMonthsAtAdmission.Value > cpt.MaxAgeInMonths

string.IsNullOrEmpty(code.Code | !regex.Match(code.Code | code.Code.Contains("-" | modifier == null | cpt == null && codes.Count == 0 | cpt == null && codes.Count > 0 | !cpt.CanPrimary | !cpt.CanSecondary

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified codeset, including the coding role. ///
/// Validates the specified codeset, including the coding role. ///
/// The fully fleshed validation with role applied. ///
validations.conditions: codes.Count( | codes.FirstOrDefault( | query.Count( | query.Count( | code.Code.Contains('+' | code.Code.Contains('+' | code.Code.Contains('*' | code.Code.Contains('*' | dagger | icd != null && (icd.IsInjuryRelated || icd.IsPoisoningRelated | externalCause == null && icd.IsInjuryRelated | externalCause == null && icd.IsPoisoningRelated

string.IsNullOrEmpty(code.Code | !regex.Match(code.Code | icd == null && codes.Count == 0 | icd == null && codes.Count > 0 | hasAsterisk && !icd.MustAsterisk | !hasAsterisk && icd.MustAsterisk | hasDagger && !icd.CanDagger | !icd.CanPrimary | !icd.CanSecondary | !icd.CanCoMorbidity | !icd.CanExternalCause

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified codeset, including the coding role. ///
/// The fully fleshed validation with role applied. ///

validations.conditions: string.IsNullOrEmpty(code.Code | !regex.Match(code.Code | impairment == null && codes.Count == 0 | impairment == null && codes.Count > 0 | !impairment.CanPrimary | !impairment.CanSecondary
string.IsNullOrEmpty(code.Code | !regex.Match(code.Code | sadanrpl == null && codes.Count == 0 | sadanrpl == null && codes.Count > 0
